title: A cooler having a cover with shape memory material
abstract: The cooler (1) of the invention comprises one or more compartments (2) in which food and drinks are placed, having two side walls (4), a rear wall (5) and an inlet port (3) enabling users to access therein, at least one evaporator (6) fastened on the rear wall (5), in which a coolant fluid circulates, at least one fan placed on the evaporator (6), transmitting cool air into the compartment (2), at least one air duct (7) opening into the compartment (2), enabling transmitting the air driven by the fan into the compartment (2), at least one storage chamber (6) placed in the compartment (2), and a cover (8) disposed between the air duct (7) and the storage chamber (6), having a shape memory material (9) consisting of pores closing upon heating and opening upon cooling.
claims: Claims ( 11 ) A cooler (1) comprising one or more compartments (2) in which food and drinks are placed, having two side walls (4), a rear wall (5) and an inlet port (3) enabling users to access therein, at least one evaporator (6) fastened on the rear wall (5), in which a coolant fluid circulates, at least one fan placed on the evaporator (6), transmitting cool air into the compartment (2), at least one air duct (7) opening into the compartment (2), enabling transmitting the air driven by the fan into the compartment (2), and at least one storage chamber (6) placed in the compartment (2), characterized by a cover (8) -		disposed between the air duct (7) and the storage chamber (6), -		having a shape memory material (9) consisting of pores closing upon heating and opening upon cooling. A cooler (1) according to claim 1, characterized by the cover (8) comprising one or more openings (11). A cooler (1) according to claim 1 , characterized by the cover (8) disposed on the rear surface (10) of the storage chamber (6), in between the air duct (7) and the storage chamber (6). A cooler (1) according to claim 3, characterized by at least one opening (11) disposed on the rear surface (10) of the storage chamber (6). A cooler (1) according to claim 3 or 4, characterized by the opening (11) disposed right above the cover (8). A cooler (1) according to claim 1, characterized by the cover (8) disposed on the rear wall (5), in between the air duct (7) and the storage chamber (6). A cooler (1) according to claim 1, characterized by at least one opening (11) disposed on the path of the air blown through the air duct (7), on the rear wall (5) and above the cover (8). A cooler (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the cover (8) configured to have two parts placed side-by-side. A cooler (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the storage chamber (6) which is a drawer placed in the compartment (2), moving on horizontal plane between the side walls (4). A cooler (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a plurality of "L" shaped first fastening members (12) positioned in vertical direction, and by a plurality of "L shaped second fastening members (13) positioned in horizontal direction, enabling mounting the cover (8). A cooler (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the shape memory material (9) having pores which close if air temperature is above 0Â°C and open if air temperature is below 0Â°C.
